calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff FUND RECOVERY SERVICES INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340.00 to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2003 Off Calendar
